title: Design System: André Finageiv — Work Index & Portfolio

display.purpose: Case numerals (001), About wordmark. Heaviest, largest, rarest voice.

label.purpose: Every cockpit readout, nav item, and eyebrow. Always uppercase, always mono.

shadows.name: shadow-none
shadows.purpose: Default for every surface — cards, buttons, panels. The system is flat at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-glow-lime
shadows.purpose: The ONLY glow in the system. Reserved for status dots signaling 'live/active' — never used for card elevation or depth.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Universal easing curve for entrances, hovers, theme change.

motion.name: dot-pulse
motion.purpose: The system's only ambient loop — status dots only.

components.name: Outline Lime Button
components.description: Primary CTA — hollow lime border at rest, solid lime fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline-lime { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #B8FF3D; color: #B8FF3D; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1), transform 0.08s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1); } .ds-btn-outline-lime:hover { background: #B8FF3D; color: #050608; } .ds-btn-outline-lime:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B8FF3D; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline-lime:active { transform: translate(1px, 1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Back/close/subtle nav — no border, dims to 60% opacity at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 8px 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #E6E8EC; opacity: 0.6; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { opacity: 1; color: #B8FF3D; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B8FF3D; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: The LIVE indicator and availability dot — the system's only ambient animation.
components.css: .ds-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #B8FF3D; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #B8FF3D; } .ds-dot--pulse { animation: ds-dot-pulse 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-dot-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.55; transform: scale(0.85); } }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Cockpit readout / eyebrow text — every instrument label in the system.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(230,232,236,0.45); } .ds-label--lime { color: #B8FF3D; } .ds-label--strong { color: #E6E8EC; }

components.name: Card (interactive surface)
components.description: Flat, borderless, transparent-to-hover-tint. No shadow, no radius.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 32px 24px; background: transparent; border: 0; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1); } .ds-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-underline-tail { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .ds-underline-tail::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -3px; height: 1px; background: currentColor; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left center; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1); } .ds-underline-tail:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.overview: This is a cockpit, not a brochure. The visual system reads as calibrated equipment: a live São Paulo clock, real coordinates (23.55°S 46.63°W), a statusbar with SYS / HH:MM:SS, folio-numbered project tabs, a pulsing ● LIVE dot. Editorial-luxury type (Big Shoulders at mega scale, Space Grotesk body) sits on top of this instrument chrome the way a fashion editorial sits on a gallery wall — the panel frames the work, it doesn't compete with it. The system explicitly rejects the generic template portfolio and cold gray minimalism. Every readout is real: real time, real coordinates, real URLs.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black stage (#0f1117, deliberately lighter than true ink)
One accent color, spent with discipline
Sharp rectangles everywhere; radius reserved for dots and focus rings
Mono type for every readout/label; display type only for headlines and hero numerals
Flat surfaces at rest; the only glow in the system signals 'live'

rules.name: The One-Signal Rule
rules.body: Lime is the only accent in the system. A second saturated color anywhere is a bug.

rules.name: The Real-Data Rule
rules.body: Every readout reflects real state. Never fabricate a stat or timestamp for decorative effect.

rules.name: The Three-Register Rule
rules.body: Display type headlines, Body type reads, Mono type instruments. A given piece of text belongs to exactly one register.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default, Glow-as-Signal Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never cast shadows. The single exception is the lime glow, reserved exclusively for status dots signaling 'live'.

dos: Do keep every readout real — live clock, true coordinates, true URLs.
Do spend lime only at the named signature moments.
Do use --r-none for every card, button, and container.
Do signal 'active/live' with the lime glow, never a drop shadow.
Do keep type in its register: Display, Body, Mono.
donts: Don't build a generic template portfolio: no identical card grids, no eyebrow kickers stacked above every section.
Don't default to cold gray minimalism.
Don't add a second saturated accent color anywhere.
Don't add shadows to cards, buttons, or panels for 'depth'.
Don't round a button or card corner.
Don't rewrite case-study copy without explicit sign-off.
